title: PME BBS892 Square Cake Board & Cake Box 14" / 35 cm, Thick Base 11 mm, Cardboard, White
features: Ideal for cakes up to 14" or multiple smaller cakes
Box dimensions: 355 x 355 x 152 mm (14 x 14 x 6")
Board dimensions: 355 x 355 x 11 mm (14 x 14 x 0.43")
Includes sturdy aluminium foil base and cake box
description: From the brand OUR STORY Since 1956, PME proudly supplies cake decorating and baking supplies to professionals, enthusiasts & home bakers in over 90 countries. Previous page Baking something special for a hobby, profession or celebrated occasion? PME ensures the sweetest client satisfaction! With our heritage in product engineering, PME distinguishes itself as a brand you can trust, as product innovation and quality are at the heart of our culture. Trust the experts for all your cake decorating equipment and ingredients, bakeware and party essentials, to add that special touch to your occasions. VIEW OUR COLLECTION Visit the store Next page
